description: Style Noteestelle jewellery captures femininity with their elegant designs which complement both ethnic and western wear. estelle is one of the brand leaders creating designer costume jewellery in India. They create beautiful pieces for stylish and elegant woman in a wide range of designs that are international in style embodying a spirit of aspiration and confidence.Warranty: 1 yearProduct Detailsnecklace and earring jewellery setGold plated floral design with imported crystal/CZ insetearrings have a push back closureMaterial and care24 carat gold platedPewter base metalEarring posts made of hypo-allergic surgical steel to avoid skin allergiesHigh quality imported Crystals/CZsWipe with a clean cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength of necklace: 41 cmLength of earrings: 2 cm
